name: @componentor/fs
description: High-performance OPFS-based Node.js fs polyfill with true sync API, VFS binary format, and bidirectional OPFS mirroring
author: Componentor
//sideEffects: All modules are side-effect-free so bundlers can tree-shake (e.g. importing only the drive classes drops the VFS engine). The worker entry files DO have side effects (self.onmessage) — they're loaded as separate worker bundles, never imported for their side effects, but listed here defensively.

scripts.benchmark:open: npm run build && PORT=3030 node tests/benchmark/server.js
scripts.benchmark:open:no-coep: npm run build && PORT=3030 node tests/benchmark/server.js --no-coep
